Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your app preferences and personalization.
Settings.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the interface.
Settings.themeDescription: Customize how OpenLaw looks on your device.

Header.confirmSignOutDescription: You are about to end your legal research session. Any unsaved queries will be cleared.

Search.title: legal research, grounded.
Search.subtitle: Ask questions in plain English. Get answers backed by exact Philippine statutes, jurisprudence, and issuances.
Search.placeholder: E.g., What are the grounds for legal separation under the Family Code?
Search.proTip: Pro tip: Use specific keywords and cite facts for more accurate results.

History.title: History
History.subtitle: Revisit your previous legal searches and conversational threads. All your grounding context, queries, and summaries are preserved here.
History.defaultDesc: Previous legal research session on OpenLaw. Click to resume querying.
History.emptyDesc: Your previous legal queries and citations will appear here once you begin searching.

Sources.title: Sources
Sources.subtitle: Explore the primary legal materials powering your research. Every result on OpenLaw is grounded strictly in these verifiable authorities.
Sources.emptySearchDesc: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.
